description.value:
Prerequisite: Craft (mechanical) 10 ranks, Craft (electrical) 10 ranks, Knowledge (technology) 5 ranks.

Benefit: The character can build cybernetic attachments. They must first make a Wealth check against the purchase DC of the attachment, then invest 24 hours in its construction. At the end of that time, they must succeed at a Craft (mechanical) check (DC 30) and a Craft (electrical) check (DC 30). If both checks succeed, the attachment can be installed at any time. If either check fails, another 24 hours must be spent fixing the problems.

Special: This feat does not allow a cybernetic attachment of a higher Progress Level to be built.
